tasks.title: Rewrite docs/index.html: Factor-only, relative fetch paths, simplified layout
tasks.description: Remove contrarian/momentum cards, backtest table, regime reference, extra KPI. Keep: header, file-protocol warning, theme toggle, single KPI row (universe, reports, regime), one Factor Model card. Fetch path: 'factor-scan-{date}.json' (relative, same-directory). JS: single render function, single fetch, -5 to +44 date range.

tasks.title: Test locally from reports/ directory
tasks.description: Kill old server. Start: python -m http.server 8080 -d reports/. Open http://localhost:8080/index.html. Verify: factor card shows INFY.NS rank 1 with conviction, scan date 2026-07-13 shows, KPI shows 1 strategy/48 signals, file-protocol warning is hidden.

tasks.title: Verify GitHub Actions deploy path is correct
tasks.description: Check daily-scan.yml deploy job confirms docs/index.html gets copied to reports/index.html. No changes needed - verify it already does: 'cp docs/index.html reports/index.html'.
